merchant_reference.description: Reference identifying an account (MID - merchant id) in the payment gateway system; must be unique across all gateways

profiling_reference.description: It is a session identifier. See profiling_reference

timestamp.description: timestamp indicating when this transaction occurred; supported format is YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS+HH:MM; time zone info (+HH:MM) can be skipped in which case it is assumed that the value is in UTC

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code or cryptocurrency symbol; must be provided when amount is provided

anyOf.title: string
anyOf.description: An amount of money as decimal string or as integer. Only decimal string is allowed for cryptocurrency.

anyOf.title: integer
anyOf.description: An amount of money as integer. Must be given in smallest possible unit according to ISO 4217. E.g. 1.99 USD = 199 (cents), 30 BRL = 3000 (centavos), 5 HUF = 500 (filler), 555 JPY = 555 (Yen), 44 BHD = 44000 (fils).

card_token.description: Token of a card used for this transaction

billing_descriptor.description: Merchant name component of the billing descriptor which appears on the customer's transaction statement (without the contact information)

extra_data.description: Data set associated with this transaction (limited to 4kB by default)
